title: Phantom typing cleanup on abrupt disconnect (relay/ws.rs)
description: connection_is_typing tracks the last processed typing_send state per WebSocket handle. On disconnect (both clean and abrupt), if the flag is true, a synthetic typing_notify {typing: false} is broadcast before removing the connection. This is correct: the flag is updated only after a successful broadcast, so it reflects what peers currently believe. A future contributor might 'simplify' this by removing the per-connection flag and relying on per-peer timers in the relay, but that would break the case where a user disconnects mid-typing — the 4-second client-side timer wouldn't fire because the client is gone.
